# One-Day Muscle-Building Meal Plan
## For 178cm, 85kg Vegetarian Athlete (No Dairy)

---

## Daily Nutritional Targets
- **Calories:** 2,800 kcal
- **Protein:** 140g (20% of calories)
- **Carbohydrates:** 350g (50% of calories)
- **Fat:** 78g (25% of calories)

---

## BREAKFAST | 7:00 AM
**Oatmeal Power Bowl**
- Rolled oats: 80g
- Unsweetened soy milk: 250ml
- Banana: 150g
- Peanut butter: 30g
- Ground flaxseed: 15g

**Nutrition:** 550 cal | 18g protein | 72g carbs | 18g fat

---

## MID-MORNING SNACK | 10:00 AM
**Protein Smoothie**
- Dairy-free protein powder (pea/hemp blend): 30g
- Mixed berries (frozen): 100g
- Oat milk: 150ml
- Almonds: 25g

**Nutrition:** 280 cal | 25g protein | 24g carbs | 9g fat

---

## LUNCH | 1:00 PM
**Chickpea & Quinoa Buddha Bowl**
- Cooked quinoa: 150g
- Canned chickpeas (drained): 200g
- Spinach: 80g
- Cherry tomatoes: 100g
- Cucumber: 120g
- Olive oil drizzle: 15ml
- Tahini dressing: 20g

**Nutrition:** 620 cal | 22g protein | 78g carbs | 20g fat

---

## AFTERNOON SNACK | 4:00 PM
**Hummus & Veggie Plate**
- Hummus: 70g
- Whole grain crackers: 40g
- Carrot sticks: 80g
- Bell pepper strips: 100g

**Nutrition:** 310 cal | 12g protein | 38g carbs | 12g fat

---

## DINNER | 7:00 PM
**Lentil & Sweet Potato Stir-Fry**
- Cooked red lentils: 200g
- Roasted sweet potato: 250g
- Kale: 100g
- Coconut oil: 10ml
- Pumpkin seeds: 20g
- Garlic & turmeric seasoning

**Nutrition:** 580 cal | 23g protein | 82g carbs | 12g fat

---

## EVENING SNACK | 9:30 PM (Optional)
**Nut Butter Toast**
- Whole grain bread: 50g
- Almond butter: 20g

**Nutrition:** 280 cal | 10g protein | 28g carbs | 14g fat

---

## Daily Totals
- **Calories:** 2,800 ✓
- **Protein:** 140g ✓
- **Carbohydrates:** 348g ✓
- **Fat:** 77g ✓

---

## Key Notes
✓ 100% dairy-free (uses plant-based milks & tahini instead of dairy products)  
✓ High protein from legumes, nuts, seeds, and plant-based protein powder  
✓ Optimized for muscle growth + cardiovascular fitness maintenance  
✓ Budget-friendly protein sources (lentils, chickpeas, oats, peanut butter)  
✓ All portions specified in grams for precise tracking  
✓ Timed meals support muscle recovery and sustained energy
